metadata.description: Autonomous issue-to-PR agent runs with signed acceptance, distributed as a single installable plugin.

plugins.name: bottega
plugins.description: One entry point, /bottega:run: the orchestrator reads the codebase, states a plan, builds with worker agents, has every diff reviewed by the opposite model family, and delivers an evidence-backed PR. Signed Gherkin specs only when the work warrants them; handed an issue unattended, it auto-signs and the PR is the only human touchpoint.
